articles.title: Karuppu release status: 9 AM shows of Suriya-Trisha starrer cancelled after CM Vijay grants permission, fans angry
articles.description: Karuppu release status: Suriya and Trisha starrer 'Karuppu,' which is slated to release today, May 14, was supposed to start screening shows from 9 AM after getting permission from CM Vijay. However, the early morning shows were cancelled later. Amid this confusion, fans have expressed their frustration on social media. Read on to know more.

articles.title: From door to ventilation: Bathroom mistakes that can cause problems
articles.description: Bathroom design might not appear to be complicated, but simple mistakes can create problems that can last for a lifetime and cost a fortune to fix. A properly designed bathroom is essential for increasing the property's value and usability.

articles.title: Aadhik Ravichandran and Aishwarya welcome baby boy
articles.description: Director Aadhik Ravichandran and his wife Aishwarya have welcomed a baby boy. This joyous occasion brings happiness to the families of Aadhik and veteran actor Prabhu. Aishwarya delivered the healthy baby boy in a Chennai hospital. Both mother and child are reported to be doing well.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by Ed Sheeran: "To be successful at anything, you have to put in a lot of..."
articles.description: Ed Sheeran’s viral quote on success highlights the power of hard work, focus and persistence, inspiring young people to stay dedicated to their goals.

articles.title: Is Diljit Dosanjh Not Indian? Punjabi Singer's US Citizenship Reports Leave Fans Curious
articles.description: Diljit Dosanjh got US citizenship in 2022 and has been travelling on a US passport since September of that year. This has sparked interest because he recently refused demands to enter Punjab politics and is strongly linked with the province.

articles.title: 'Krishnavataram Part 1: The Heart' box office collections day 8: Hardik Gajjar’s devotional epic holds steady; India Net touches Rs 12.10 Cr
articles.description: Devotional drama 'Krishnavataram Part 1: The Heart' continues its theatrical run, earning Rs 3 lakhs on Day 8, bringing its total net collection to Rs 12.10 crore. The film, a grand retelling of Krishna's life, boasts spectacular visuals and an emotionally rich narrative. Despite a slowdown, it remains a significant devotional offering in cinemas.

articles.title: When Vinod Mehra’s mother picked up sandal to assault Rekha and denied her entry into their home after wedding rumours
articles.description: Vinod Mehra, known for his gentle screen presence and understated performances, remains a familiar name in Hindi cinema long after his passing. Alongside his steady film career, his personal life—particularly rumours about his alleged relationship with Rekha—has continued to keep him in public discussion over the years.

articles.title: Luxury SUV, premium rent, Rs 1.5 lakh EMIs on Rs 1.8 lakh salary: CA warns one missed paycheck could trigger financial crisis
articles.description: A high salary does not guarantee wealth. CA Nitin Kaushik warns that lifestyle inflation erases financial security. Expenses rise with income, leaving little for emergencies. Consistent saving, not just earning, builds true wealth. Even high earners can face crisis with one missed paycheck. Building assets is crucial for long-term financial strength.

articles.title: 'Prempaatta' first look unveiled: Joemon Jyothir leads youthful campus romance; Set during an NSS camp
articles.description: Renowned director Aamir Pallikkal, known for his celebrated films, makes a grand announcement with the reveal of the first-look poster for his new youthful romantic drama, 'Prempatta'. Set against the lively backdrop of an NSS camp, the film delves into the dynamics of college friendships and the excitement of first love, featuring Joemon Jyothir in a pivotal role.

articles.title: Tiger Woods' private jet lands in Florida from Zurich- Is his 'intense' rehab finally over?
articles.description: Tiger Woods has reportedly returned to Florida after spending around 40 days at a rehabilitation facility in Zurich following his DUI arrest and rollover crash in April. While his private jet’s arrival sparked optimism about his recovery, the focus has quickly shifted back to the legal case surrounding the incident. Prosecutors recently gained access to Woods’ prescription drug records, adding another layer to an already complicated situation. Woods has pleaded not guilty and remains away from competition as scrutiny continues both on and off the golf course.

articles.title: Quarterback Season 3: Who are the four QBs to be featured on Netflix docuseries
articles.description: Netflix’s Quarterback returns July 14 with a cast built around transition, pressure, and reinvention. Baker Mayfield deals with the fallout of Tampa Bay’s late collapse, Jayden Daniels faces soaring expectations after a breakout rookie year, Cam Ward begins his NFL career under intense scrutiny, and Joe Flacco delivers a rare inside look at a veteran navigating a midseason trade. Rather than relying purely on superstar appeal, Season 3 appears focused on the emotional realities behind the NFL’s most demanding position.

articles.title: Abhishek Bachchan's first look from 'King' LEAKED
articles.description: Abhishek Bachchan's villainous first look from 'King' has reportedly leaked online, sparking fan frenzy and frustration over repeated set leaks. The viral image shows him with a shotgun, dressed in a grey overcoat. This follows earlier leaks of Shah Rukh Khan and Suhana Khan's looks. The film, slated for Christmas 2026, is set for a major box office clash.

articles.title: Mouni makes FIRST APPEARANCE amid divorce buzz- PICS
articles.description: Mouni Roy was recently spotted wearing a diamond ring, sparking speculation about her marriage to Suraj Nambiar. This appearance comes amid divorce rumors, which intensified after the couple unfollowed each other on social media. Roy had previously requested media to refrain from publishing false narratives and grant them privacy.

articles.title: 'Intentional message to China's Xi?’ Marco Rubio’s Maduro-inspired Nike Tech Fit sparks frenzy
articles.description: Marco Rubio’s viral “Maduro Nike Tech” look aboard Air Force One has completely taken over the internet as the US Secretary of State heads to Beijing with Donald Trump despite previously being sanctioned by China. Social media exploded with memes, with many users calling Rubio’s tracksuit choice an “intentional message” to China and linking it to Nicolás Maduro’s infamous arrest look. Rubio’s outfit sparked massive reactions after comparisons emerged between his grey Nike tracksuit and the one Maduro wore during his dramatic capture by US forces. The White House added fuel to the meme storm by calling the moment “Full Circle,” while internet users coined phrases like “Maduromaxxing” as the memes flooded X and other platforms.

articles.title: Taylor Swift, Sabrina Carpenter Share Songwriter Of The Year Honour At BMI Awards
articles.description: Taylor Swift won BMI Pop Songwriter of the Year for the third year in a row, marking her sixth time she has received the honour.

articles.title: Rahul says the industry forgot him when he returned after wife's death
articles.description: Actor Rahul Dev candidly shared the profound challenges of single parenting after his wife's passing in 2009. He recounted his struggle to re-enter the film industry after a four-year hiatus, feeling forgotten despite a substantial filmography. His spiritual guru played a pivotal role in guiding him through this difficult period and encouraging his professional comeback.

articles.description: Living in the ultra-exclusive California community of Montecito has long symbolized a fresh start for Prince Harry and Meghan Markle after stepping away from royal duties. But maintaining that lifestyle reportedly comes with significant financial demands. Beyond mortgage costs, security continues to be one of the family’s largest ongoing expenses.

articles.title: Cannes 2026 Turns Chaotic After Urvashi Rautela’s Viral “I Am India” Moment
articles.description: Urvashi Rautela grabbed major attention at the 79th Cannes Film Festival 2026 after her glamorous silver gown and emotional statement on representing India went viral online. While interacting with the media on the red carpet, the actress said, “I’m no more Urvashi... I am India,” instantly sparking reactions, debates, and memes across social media. Dressed in a heavily embellished sheer silver outfit, Urvashi once again delivered one of the festival’s most talked-about celebrity appearances, with fans and fashion watchers divided between calling it iconic, dramatic, and peak Cannes energy.
